entity: 2008-09 NBA Finals: Los Angeles Lakers def. Orlando Magic 4-1 (Kobe's 4th title and first Finals MVP without Shaq)

query_target.sql: WITH real_games AS (SELECT DISTINCT season_id, series_id, game_id, home_team_id, away_team_id FROM fact_playoff_series WHERE ? IN (home_team_id, away_team_id)), joined AS (SELECT rg.season_id, rg.series_id, g.game_date, CASE WHEN rg.home_team_id = ? THEN g.wl_home ELSE g.wl_away END AS team_wl, CASE WHEN rg.home_team_id = ? THEN rg.away_team_id ELSE rg.home_team_id END AS opponent_team_id FROM real_games rg JOIN game g ON g.game_id = rg.game_id), series_agg AS (SELECT season_id, series_id, opponent_team_id, MIN(game_date) AS series_start, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE team_wl = 'W') AS wins, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE team_wl = 'L') AS losses FROM joined GROUP BY season_id, series_id, opponent_team_id), numbered AS (SELECT sa.season_id, sa.wins, sa.losses, sa.opponent_team_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY sa.season_id ORDER BY sa.series_start) AS round_number FROM series_agg sa) SELECT n.season_id, n.wins, n.losses, n.round_number, COALESCE(th_era.abbreviation, th_current.abbreviation) AS opponent_abbreviation FROM numbered n LEFT JOIN dim_team_history th_era ON th_era.team_id = n.opponent_team_id AND n.season_id >= th_era.valid_from AND (th_era.valid_to IS NULL OR n.season_id < th_era.valid_to) LEFT JOIN dim_team_history th_current ON th_current.team_id = n.opponent_team_id AND th_current.is_current WHERE n.season_id = '2008-09' AND n.round_number = 4

notes: Indexed from the LAL side (1610612747). SQL filters to round_number=4 to make the Finals-only contract explicit (no need to discriminate by season, since LAL only made one Finals appearance in 2008-09). This is the only LAL Finals in the 2008-10 window where the 4-1 margin matches BBR exactly (2008 was 2-4 to BOS, 2010 was 4-3 over BOS).
